<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Delete platform"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/api/meshobjects/meshplatforms/74a36dbe-974b-4ef4-ba4b-33b238832526"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Delete a meshPlatform by its UUID. WARNING: Deleting a meshPlatform has significant consequences.
All associated meshTenants will be automatically deleted in meshStack, but the actual cloud resources
remain untouched. Usage reports for the current month will not be finalized and will not be included
in chargeback statements. Users will lose access to platform tenants via meshStack but can still
access them directly in the cloud platform. You cannot create a new meshPlatform with the same
identifier in the same location. This operation cannot be undone. Ensure you have proper backups
and have communicated the impact to affected users.

**Authentication:** This endpoint supports API Key authentication.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}

  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>
